# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_http
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          codec_type: AUTO
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: api_gateway_vhost
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/users"
                route:
                  cluster: users_service_cluster
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/products"
                route:
                  cluster: products_service_cluster
              # Default route for unmatched paths
              - match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: default_service_cluster
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
  clusters:
  - name: users_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: users_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 8080
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 8081
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        host: "users-service.local" # Host header for health check
      no_traffic_interval: 60s # Continue health checking even if no traffic
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 300s # Keep connections open for 5 minutes of inactivity
    http_protocol_options:
      max_requests_per_connection: 100 # Max requests over a single HTTP/1.1 connection
  - name: products_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: products_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 9000
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 9001
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        host: "products-service.local"
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 300s
    http_protocol_options:
      max_requests_per_connection: 100
  - name: default_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: default_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 10000 # Example default service
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        host: "default-service.local"
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 300s
    http_protocol_options:
      max_requests_per_connection: 100

admin:
  access_log_path: "/dev/stdout"
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 8001
